lex.bot.testbotaliassettings.CfnAbout: Specifies configuration settings for the alias used to test the bot. If the `TestBotAliasSettings` property is not specified, the settings are configured with default values.

lex.bot.testbotaliassettings.BotAliasLoc.Description: Specifies settings that are unique to a locale. For example, you can use a different Lambda function depending on the bot's locale.

lex.bot.testbotaliassettings.Conversatio.Description: Specifies settings for conversation logs that save audio, text, and metadata information for conversations with your users.

lex.bot.testbotaliassettings.Description.Description: Specifies a description for the test bot alias.

lex.bot.testbotaliassettings.SentimentAn.Description: Specifies whether Amazon Lex will use Amazon Comprehend to detect the sentiment of user utterances.
